project.name: codeorbit
project.description: CodeOrbit is an enterprise-grade, project-based Educational Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) platform designed to act as a guided, hands-on engineering apprenticeship. It integrates a learning management dashboard, Socratic AI mentorship (Orbit), and an in-browser VS Code-like IDE to ensure students write every line of code themselves, avoiding the 'Tutorial Hell' and 'AI Copypasta' traps.

active_tasks.description: Harden API security and RLS policies

decisions.decision: Phase completed: Phase 1 - Legacy Code Integration
decisions.reason: Completed Phase 1. Cleaned up all duplicate functions/ directories and legacy documentation root files. Set up proper docs/ subdirectories. Verified typechecks and code compilation. Added robust error boundaries to the IDE workspace panel integrations.
